summary: Set 051 Session 2 of 4 - executed the audit-locked ai_router removals + packaging fixes (verdict.md V1-V9). Deleted the orphaned joiner/ subpackage (7 files) + dabbler_launch.py + 7 dead tests (~3,734 LOC) after salvaging the D3 writer-bypass detector into a new self-contained ai_router/writer_discipline.py + test (V2). Retired the long-broken backfill_session_state console script (V3 EMPIRICAL CORRECTION of the verdict's 'repoint' disposition: ai_router/scripts/ has no __init__.py and namespaces=false, so the module is not importable as ai_router.scripts.backfill_session_state even from the built wheel -- repointing would still ship a broken script) + added test_entry_points.py import-checking every remaining [project.scripts] target. Relocated the two stray scripts/ tests into ai_router/tests/ (V4); they had never run (testpaths excluded scripts/), so relocation surfaced + fixed real latent issues per operator direction (relocate+fix, via AskUserQuestion): trimmed dump_session_state_schema.py _FIELD_COMMENTS of 7 stale legacy v4-dropped keys, corrected both scripts/ utilities' broken standalone sys.path bootstrap (parent -> parent.parent), and updated test_session_state_backfill.py stale pre-v4 assertions. Kept the four migrators (V5). Added test_packaging_hygiene.py regrowth guard (V6, caught a lingering empty joiner/ dir). MIGRATIONS.md + existing migrator docstrings cover V7. Marked cross-repo-harvest-notice.md + narration-templates.md historical (V8). Dependency audit confirmed no droppable dep (V9, deleted code stdlib-only). Suite: 1029 passed / 1 skipped. Wheel built + inspected: no test_* ships, island gone, writer_discipline.py + 4 console scripts present, backfill entry point absent. Two deviations flagged for S4 verifier: V3 retire-vs-repoint (empirical), and the V4 sys.path bootstrap fixes (behavior changes to already-broken standalone paths, justified under operator relocate+fix). S2 invoked no router -- $0 routed; cumulative $0.0272/$10.

reason.specifics: S3 retires the superseded Set 050 Claude SessionStart hook in the VS Code extension per spec: delete tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/scripts/claude-session-start-invoker.js, remove the installOrchestratorHook.claudeCode command + its 'Copy manual setup' toast + package.json registration + extension.ts wiring, delete the now-dead test_invoker_schema_constant.py, rewrite the CLAUDE.md/docs hook passages as historical pointing at Set 053's lifecycle drift advisory, and provide a consumer/operator hook-removal note (do NOT edit machine settings). Extension change -> Marketplace release, distinct from the ai_router PyPI release. Same Claude/Opus orchestrator keeps continuity of the removal-arc context.
